title: Family Compound — 45th Birthday
summary: Four homes on shared land for Max + wife, two daughters' future homes, and in-laws. Target completion by Max's 45th birthday in 2032. Long horizon. Funded by spec-home profits and ongoing GCC cash flow.

phases.label: Land acquired (target acreage, zoning, geo TBD)
Master site plan drafted (lot positions, utilities, shared infrastructure)

action_items.label: Geographic shortlist (North Fulton vs. exurban vs. mountains)
Talk to wife about her must-haves
Research land use, septic, well requirements for target areas

risks: Six-year horizon. Family priorities will shift. Daughters' preferences as they hit teens. Keep the vision but don't over-engineer the plan yet.
notes: Funded by stacking Deal 1 + Deal 2 + Deal 3+ profits, plus ongoing GCC. Don't lock in specifics until Deal 1 proves the business model works.
